turns.content: Hi! Thanks for your interest in joining us. I'll ask a few quick questions. What's your name?
Great, Maria. Which position are you applying for?
I'm applying to be a line cook.
How many years of kitchen experience do you have?
About four years, mostly on the grill station.
I'm open weekday evenings and weekends, both day and evening.
When could you start, and are you authorized to work here?
I can start on June 23rd, and yes I'm authorized to work in the US.
